methodology.name: LLM Border Threat Taxonomy
methodology.description: OpenRouter free routing chooses the final country attribution and canonical threat category for each headline.

regional_summary_6h.headline: Iran dominates regional border threat activity with execution, Russia talks, Hormuz offer; Georgia delimitation push
bullets: Iran executed a man for Jaish al-Adl membership and armed rebellion.
Pashinyan said completing delimitation with Georgia is on the agenda.
Iran's Foreign Minister Araghchi held talks in Russia and offered to end the Strait of Hormuz chokehold if the US ends its siege, after a Pakistani-delivered message was sent to the US.
regional_summary_6h.watch: Monitor Iran's Hormuz offer follow-up and Georgia's delimitation progress.
